reviews.review_description: This is a great program to have. You can be a beginner or pro. It gives you what you need to constantly stay sharp & improve your mechanics. You can do it all, step in get in the slot, see the pitch all the way, work on timing. Now with pitching software being used as a metric, this can help you work into get better in the buffer zone too. Gents thanks for your meticulous attention to detail and adjustment making to help us all get better!

I hope the developers are working on polishing this game. As of now, it’s the best umpire simulator in the Quest. Unlike Win Reality, this adds a batter and a catcher, though the graphics aren’t as realistic. 
If we could use the trigger and grip instead of the X and Y buttons to call balls and strikes, that would nice. There is also no scoring or anything keeping stats of my calls. Maybe make a game out of it, or have a 7/9 inning game sim. Please keep polishing.
I can get a bat it’s new.

This is an excellent game for umpire training, but it would be improved by including other plays like at first, second, third, or home. Adding a full game mechanic where you’re responsible for everything during a game would also be beneficial. (INCLUDE A VERBAL BALL/STRIKE SYSTEM BECAUSE EACH TIME I CLICK THE WRONG BUTTON, I GET OFF TRACK AND CONFUSED)
Tool is very helpful to develop ball strike accuracy, very easy to use, no pitcher catcher needed. Can use anywhere anytime. Good value for money with constant improvements and updates.

Hey guys, please take this into consideration when you are doing your next update.

1. The game should stop after 27 outs. Then the graphic should show you all of the pitches that you saw. Different colors for the ones you got right and the ones you got wrong.
   -This way, you can see where you are consistently wrong or consistently, right?

2. Making a verbal call ball or strike instead of pushing a button.

3. Showing whether you got the answer, correct or not, should be out in the outfield, so you don't have to turn around each time to see

This is a really good start, guys. I am a part of an umpiring league, and I'm going to bring this up at our next meeting that we all should be getting this for training. Please take these into consideration when doing your next update. I only want to make this thing better.

Thx 
Tom

I hopped into the game and I went to go take some cuts but then the bat wasent there to where I can swing idk if I can’t swing or not or if it’s just a pitch recognition game or a game where u can actually swing
